schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
schemes.benefit: Rs 1.2-1.3 lakh grant for pucca house construction (rural)
schemes.eligibility: Homeless/kutcha house families in SECC list

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
schemes.benefit: Interest subsidy 3-6.5% on home loan OR grant up to Rs 2.67 lakh

schemes.name: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS)
schemes.benefit: Home loan interest subsidy up to Rs 2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG
schemes.eligibility: First-time homebuyers with income < Rs 18 lakh/year

schemes.name: National Urban Livelihood Mission (Housing)
schemes.benefit: Affordable rental housing for urban poor

schemes.name: Indira Awas Yojana (IAY) Legacy Beneficiaries
schemes.benefit: Housing assistance for incomplete IAY houses
schemes.eligibility: Existing IAY beneficiaries with incomplete construction

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor Housing Benefit)
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free working capital loans Rs 10K-50K + credit score benefit

schemes.name: Rajiv Awas Yojana
schemes.benefit: Slum rehabilitation and affordable housing for slum dwellers

schemes.name: PMAY NE States Special Package
schemes.benefit: Enhanced grant Rs 1.3 lakh for NE states and hill states

schemes.name: Housing for Plantation Workers
schemes.benefit: Housing assistance for tea and coffee plantation workers

schemes.name: Affordable Rental Housing Complexes (ARHC)
schemes.benefit: Low-cost rental accommodation for urban migrants

schemes.name: Valmiki Ambedkar Awas Yojana (VAMBAY)
schemes.benefit: Subsidized shelter for urban slum dwellers below poverty line

schemes.name: NHB Residex Scheme
schemes.benefit: Housing loan at reduced rates through NHB registered lenders
schemes.eligibility: Home loan seekers in notified cities

schemes.name: Global Housing Technology Challenge
schemes.benefit: Access to affordable innovative housing construction tech

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana LIFE (PMAY-LIFE)
schemes.benefit: Turnkey housing via private builders under PMAY EWS category
schemes.eligibility: EWS category families not yet with permanent housing
